Email Confirmation Follow-up - Brick & Mortar         	        Copyright Free Template
SUBJECT:  Thank You For Claiming [Insert Bribe]!
Hi (First Name)
Congratulations. Thank you for taking action and claiming
[Insert Savings, Irresistible Offer Or Coupon].
We know you’ll enjoy coming into [insert store] and [paint
a picture in the prospect’s mind of walking through your
immense stock. Focus on rare or hard-to-find items
that’ll pique your prospect’s interest].
You can access [insert link to irresistible offer, such as
coupon here. If they’re coming into the store to claim
a free gift, give directions to the store and hours].
(Insert Link)
This is sure to [Insert big emotional benefit the prospect will get,
like attracting more women, feeling more confident, remove
a pain, or fulfill a desire they’ve always had].
Thanks, and we’ll see you in [Insert Store] soon!
[Insert Name]
P.S. We challenge you to find another store in [location] that
[Insert characteristic that makes you unique in your area].
We look forward to seeing you soon!
